希望各位巴打絲打可以幫手翻譯唔同語言嘅文宣，然後係各大平台 Twitter 推去世界各地，
希望Army同外國人都可以幫幫手投我哋一票。
而我哋都要答應Army下次會再投返比佢哋以作報答。


因為大家要知道BTS係世界各地都有一大班Army，真係需要佢哋幫手。

呢個係我暫時諗到嘅辦法。

政府打緊公關戰同輿論戰，口誅筆伐黎解散呢場運動，手足知唔知我地下一步要點做？

- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區

如果大家覺得呢個辦法可行嘅話，
希望可以幫手推一推

replies.msg:
乜香港仲有人理佢嘅咩身邊有朋友係佢粉絲
係佢嘅周邊全部抌晒

其實好簡單 因為bts啲fans其實好團結而且會互相關心 (之前見過唔知邊個國家嘅army比軍隊欺壓 跟住成堆army 衝去retweet煲大件事比世界知）
所以大家去twitter 推呢張相 係fans都會識呢隻公仔
同d外國fans講香港army比人打 叫佢地想救香港army 就投埋yes比香港 記得hashtag army/bts 先會有人睇到
Bts 成2000萬個followers仲要黎自世界各地 唔該唔好亂踩人地偶像搞到人地變我地敵人 應該拉佢地黎做我地朋友
垃圾網搞左兩次email confirmation都投唔刊
叫佢地落黎香港睇下邊啲少年真防彈啊
其實bts咁多外國fans仲要投入到勁高一定幫手投票 最重要一大堆中國狗no緊你香港 你越多人投佢地越多人反 之後如果真係咁好彩贏到大陸人啲army見到你就快過bts又係no番你 其實真係冇得贏

Online poll
Time magazine also holds an online poll for the readers to vote for who they believe to be the Person of the Year. While many mistakenly believe the winner of the poll to be the Person of the Year, the title, as mentioned above, is decided by the editors of Time. In the first online poll held in 1998, wrestler and activist Mick Foley won with over 50% of the votes.[15][16] Foley was removed from the poll, and the title was given to Bill Clinton and Ken Starr, which led to outrage from the fans of Foley who mistakenly believed the winner of the poll would be the winner of the title. In 2006, the poll winner by a wide margin was Hugo Chávez, with 35% of the votes. The president of Iran, Mahmoud Ahmadinejad, came in second. Time again ignored those results, not mentioning them in the announcement of the Person of the Year.[17] Time continues to annually run an online poll for the "People's Choice", but stresses the decision on whom the magazine recognizes is not made by the poll, but by the magazine's editors.[18]

quote.msg:
好簡單
希望各位巴打絲打可以幫手翻譯唔同語言嘅文宣，然後係各大平台 Twitter 推去世界各地，
希望Army同外國人都可以幫幫手投我哋一票。
而我哋都要答應Army下次會再投返比佢哋以作報答。


因為大家要知道BTS係世界各地都有一大班Army，真係需要佢哋幫手。

但香港多一日就傷多啲人 死人

quote.msg:
填過email就唔好再等，IT 巴打教你長驅直進
Google Chrome Desktop -> ctrl + shift + C -> 按 console -> 輸入
document.getElementById("login").remove();
document.getElementById("after-login").remove();

然後enter
跟住大大力投，選情告急呀

我更正一下，淨係行依句先啱
document.getElementById("after-login").remove();

睇佢方法，推測只要過幾日收埋封subscribe email驗證咗，大家既投票先會生效
所以記住都要乖乖地比個email佢，只不過唔駛等佢，投住先都得

replies.msg:
Army,
We are the pro-democracy HongKongers. I hope that you do not feel offensive since HongKongers are encouraging netizens to vote for HongKongers instead of your beloved BTS. HongKongers now are fighting in a war for our freedom. Many of us are being attacked, raped and killed by the totalitarian regime. We hope that we can win for this year because our situation now is so severe and we wish to raise more global awareness and aid through this vote. We definitely have no hostility to BTS and any other Korean pop stars. We are peaceful protestors who will clean up the streets and let ambulance go through demonstrations. We promise to understand and support more BTS later on. Thanks for your sincere help!
